heading: Death from service-connected disability
label: 2307 Death from service-connected disability
text: In any case in which a veteran dies as the result of a service-connected disability or disabilities, the Secretary, upon the request of the survivors of such veteran, shall pay the burial and funeral expenses incurred in connection with the death of the veteran in an amount not exceeding the greater of (1) $2,000, or (2) the amount authorized to be paid under in the case of a Federal employee whose death occurs as the result of an injury sustained in the performance of duty. Funeral and burial benefits provided under this section shall be in lieu of any benefits authorized under subsections (a)(1) and (b)(2) of .section 8134(a) of title 5section 2303 of this title

(b). substituted “and (b)(2)” for “and (b)” in last sentence.Pub. L. 108–1832001— substituted “$2,000” for ‘$1,500”.Pub. L. 107–1031991— renumbered as this section and substituted “2302 and 2303(a)(1)” for “902 and 903(a)(1)”.Pub. L. 102–83section 907 of this title1989— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 101–2371988— substituted “$1,500” for “$1,100”.Pub. L. 100–3221978— inserted “the greater of (1) $1,100, or (2)” after “not exceeding”.Pub. L. 95–479
